info.name: My Collection
info.description:
### Welcome to Postman! This is your first collection. 

Collections are your starting point for building and testing APIs. You can use this one to:

• Group related requests
• Test your API in real-world scenarios
• Document and share your requests

Update the name and overview whenever you’re ready to make it yours.

[Learn more about Postman Collections.](https://learning.postman.com/docs/collections/collections-overview/)

exec: const to_md5 = orderNumber + orderAmount + orderCurrency + orderDescription + PASSWORD;

request.description:
## 📥 Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `merchant_key` | String | ✅ Yes | Key for Merchant identification |
| `operation` | String | ✅ Yes | Send the “purchase” value so that the payment page for sale initiation will be shown to the customer. |
| `methods` | Array | ✅ Yes | An array of payment methods |
| `order` | Object | ✅ Yes | Information about an order |
| `order.number` | String | ✅ Yes | Order ID - is a merchant system ID that refers to particular payment attempt. It is recommended to use unique Order ID per each payment request |
| `order.amount` | String | ✅ Yes | Format depends on currency |
| `order.currency` | String | ✅ Yes | Currency |
| `order.description` | String | ✅ Yes | Product name |
| `customer` | Object | ✅ Yes | Customer's information. Send an object if a payment method needs |
| `customer.name` | String | ✅ Yes | Full name of the customer |
| `customer.email` | String | ✅ Yes | Email address of the customer |
| `success_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to redirect the Customer in case of the successful payment |
| `cancel_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to return Customer in case of a payment cancellation (“Close” button on the Checkout page) |
| `hash` | String | ✅ Yes | Special signature to validate your request to Payment Platform Addition in Signature section. |

exec: const to_md5 = identifier + order_id + order_amount + order_currency + PASSWORD;

request.description:
### 📥 Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `action` | String | ✅ Yes | Action to perform (=SALE) |
| `client_key` | String | ✅ Yes | Unique client key (CLIENT_KEY) |
| `brand` | String | ✅ Yes | Brand through which the transaction is performed |
| `order_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Transaction ID in the Clients system |
| `order_amount` | Number | ✅ Yes | The amount of the transaction |
| `order_currency` | String | ✅ Yes | Currency |
| `order_description` | String | ✅ Yes | Description of the transaction (product name) |
| `identifier` | String | ✅ Yes | Extra parameter for transaction. It could be token, account information, additional descriptor etc. |
| `payer_first_name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's first name |
| `payer_last_name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's last name |
| `payer_email` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's email address |
| `payer_phone` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's phone number |
| `payer_ip` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's IP address |
| `return_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to which Customer should be returned after operation in third-party system |
| `hash` | String | ✅ Yes | Special signature to validate your request to Payment Platform |

exec: const to_md5 = orderNumber + orderAmount + orderCurrency + orderDescription + PASSWORD;

request.description:
## 📥 Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `merchant_key` | String | ✅ Yes | Key for Merchant identification |
| `operation` | String | ✅ Yes | Defines a payment transaction. Send the “credit” value so that the payment page for credit initiation will be shown to the customer. |
| `methods` | Array | ✅ Yes | An array of payment methods. Limits the available methods on the Checkout page |
| `order` | Object | ✅ Yes | Information about an order |
| `order.number` | String | ✅ Yes | Order ID - is a merchant system ID that refers to particular payment attempt |
| `order.amount` | String | ✅ Yes | Format depends on currency |
| `order.currency` | String | ✅ Yes | Currency |
| `order.description` | String | ✅ Yes | Product name |
| `customer` | Object | ✅ Yes | Customer's information. Send an object if a payment method needs |
| `customer.name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's name |
| `customer.email` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's email address |
| `parameters` | Object | ✅ Yes | Extra-parameters required for specific payment method |
| `parameters.fp-upi` | Object | ✅ Yes | Specific parameters block for the fp-upi payment method |
| `parameters.fp-upi.account_name` | String | ⬅ Optional | Customer's name |
| `parameters.fp-upi.account_number` | String | ⬅ Optional | Account Number - Customer's account number |
| `parameters.fp-upi.ifsc_code` | String | ⬅ Optional | IFSC code |
| `success_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to redirect the Customer in case of the successful payment |
| `cancel_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to return Customer in case of a payment cancellation (“Close” button on the Checkout page) |
| `hash` | String | ✅ Yes | Special signature to validate your request to Payment Platform Addition in Signature section |

### 📥 Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `action` | String | ✅ Yes | Action to perform (=SALE) |
| `client_key` | String | ✅ Yes | Unique client key (CLIENT_KEY) |
| `brand` | String | ✅ Yes | Brand through which the transaction is performed |
| `order_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Transaction ID in the Clients system |
| `order_amount` | Number | ✅ Yes | The amount of the transaction |
| `order_currency` | String | ✅ Yes | Currency |
| `order_description` | String | ✅ Yes | Description of the transaction (product name) |
| `identifier` | String | ✅ Yes | Extra parameter for transaction. It could be token, account information, additional descriptor etc. |
| `payer_first_name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's first name |
| `payer_last_name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's last name |
| `payer_email` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's email address |
| `payer_phone` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's phone number |
| `payer_ip` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's IP address |
| `return_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to which Customer should be returned after operation in third-party system |
| `hash` | String | ✅ Yes | Special signature to validate your request to Payment Platform |

exec: const to_md5 = orderNumber + orderAmount + orderCurrency + orderDescription + PASSWORD;

request.description:
## 📥 Request Body

Minimum amount PayIn 1000 TRY

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `merchant_key` | String | ✅ Yes | Key for Merchant identification |
| `operation` | String | ✅ Yes | Defines a payment transaction |
| `methods` | Array | ✅ Yes | Array of payment methods |
| `order` | Object | ✅ Yes | Object containing the transaction order details |
| `order.number` | String | ✅ Yes | Order ID |
| `order.amount` | String | ✅ Yes | The amount of the transaction |
| `order.currency` | String | ✅ Yes | Three-letter currency code |
| `order.description` | String | ✅ Yes | Product name or order description |
| `cancel_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to return the Customer in case of payment cancellation |
| `success_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to redirect the Customer after successful payment |
| `customer` | Object | ✅ Yes | Object containing customer personal information |
| `customer.name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's name |
| `customer.email` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's email address |
| `hash` | String | ✅ Yes | Special signature to validate your request |

exec: const to_md5 = identifier + order_id + order_amount + order_currency + PASSWORD;

request.description:
### 📥 Request Body

Minimum amount PayIn 1000 TRY

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `action` | String | ✅ Yes | Action to perform (=SALE) |
| `client_key` | String | ✅ Yes | Unique client key (CLIENT_KEY) |
| `brand` | String | ✅ Yes | Brand through which the transaction is performed |
| `order_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Transaction ID in the Clients system |
| `order_amount` | Number | ✅ Yes | The amount of the transaction |
| `order_currency` | String | ✅ Yes | Currency |
| `order_description` | String | ✅ Yes | Description of the transaction (product name) |
| `identifier` | String | ✅ Yes | Extra parameter for transaction. It could be token, account information, additional descriptor etc. |
| `payer_first_name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's first name |
| `payer_last_name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's last name |
| `payer_email` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's email address |
| `payer_phone` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's phone number |
| `payer_ip` | String | ✅ Yes | IP-address of the Customer. Both versions, IPv4 and IPv6, can be used. If you are sending IPv6, make sure the payment provider that processes the payments supports it. |
| `return_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to which Customer should be returned after operation in third-party system |
| `parameters[user_id]` | String | ✅ Yes | Unique user identifier in the merchant's system |
| `hash` | String | ✅ Yes | Special signature to validate your request to Payment Platform |

exec: const to_md5 = orderNumber + orderAmount + orderCurrency + orderDescription + PASSWORD;

request.description:
## 📥 Request Body

Minimum amount PayOut 5000 TRY

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `merchant_key` | String | ✅ Yes | Key for Merchant identification |
| `operation` | String | ✅ Yes | Send the “credit” value so that the payment page for credit initiation will be shown to the customer |
| `methods` | Array | ✅ Yes | An array of payment methods. Limits the available methods on the Checkout page |
| `order` | Object | ✅ Yes | Object containing the transaction order details |
| `order.number` | String | ✅ Yes | Unique transaction ID in the Client's system (Order ID) |
| `order.amount` | String | ✅ Yes | Amount of the transaction in the format specified for the currency |
| `order.currency` | String | ✅ Yes | Currency. 3 characters for fiat currencies |
| `order.description` | String | ✅ Yes | Product name or order description (String up to 1024 characters) |
| `payee` | Object | ✅ Yes | Payee's information. Specify additional information about Payee for transfer or credit operation if it is required by payment provider. |
| `payee.name` | String | ✅ Yes | Customer's name |
| `success_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to redirect the Customer in case of the successful payment |
| `cancel_url` | String | ✅ Yes | URL to return Customer in case of a payment cancellation (“Close” button on the Checkout page) |
| `hash` | String | ✅ Yes | Special signature to validate your request to Payment Platform Addition in Signature section |
| `parameters` | Object | ✅ Yes | Extra-parameters required for specific payment method |
| `parameters.havaleout` | Object | ✅ Yes | Specific parameters block for the havaleout payment method |
| `parameters.havaleout.user_id` | String | ✅ Yes | User ID |
| `parameters.havaleout.bankName` | String | ✅ Yes | Name of the bank |
| `parameters.havaleout.bankAccount` | String | ✅ Yes | IBAN |

### 📥 Request Body

Minimum amount PayOut 5000 TRY

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `action` | String | ✅ Yes | Action to perform(=CREDIT2VIRTUAL) |
| `client_key` | String | ✅ Yes | Unique client key (CLIENT_KEY) |
| `order_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Order ID in the Clients system |
| `order_amount` | Number | ✅ Yes | The amount of the transaction |
| `order_currency` | String | ✅ Yes | Currency |
| `order_description` | String | ✅ Yes | Description of the transaction (product name) |
| `brand` | String | ✅ Yes | Brand through which the transaction is performed |
| `payee_first_name` | String | ⬅ Optional | Customer's name |
| `payee_last_name` | String | ⬅ Optional | Customer's surname |
| `parameters[user_id]` | String | ⬅ Optional | Brand-specific parameter containing the user ID on the merchant side |
| `parameters[bankName]` | String | ✅ Yes | Brand-specific parameter containing the name of the recipient's bank |
| `parameters[bankAccount]` | String | ✅ Yes | Brand-specific parameter containing the IBAN or bank account number of the recipient |
| `hash` | String | ✅ Yes | Special signature to validate your request to Payment Platform |

exec: const to_md5 = orderNumber + orderAmount + orderCurrency + orderDescription + PASSWORD;
